# Omesh Bhujbal

> Executive portfolio of Omesh Bhujbal, Chief Technology Officer with 22+ years driving digital transformation, AI/ML innovation, and enterprise technology at scale.

Omesh Bhujbal is a technology executive currently serving as Vice President – Digital & Information Technology at The Leela Palaces, Hotels and Resorts. His career spans large-scale digital transformation, AI strategy, BSS/OSS modernization, and CVM programs across telecom and hospitality.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Portfolio overview including about, experience, education, skills, achievements, and contact.
